_comment: Predeclared answers to the ambiguity prompts adopt (TT7) raises when inferring required_layers, so an unattended runner never stalls on a human prompt. Keyed by FR; each answer records the chosen layers + provenance it should stamp.

app::FR-03.02.question: FR-03.02 has no Layers column. Infer as UI/flow (e2e) or leave defaulted (unit)?

app::FR-03.03.question: FR-03.03 persists to a DB. Infer integration, or default to unit only?
